hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os, subprocess

AUTHORIZED_EMAIL = 'suhaib.athar@gmail.com'
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
bn = os.path.basename(fp)

if bn in ('CLAUDE.md', 'AGENTS.md'):
    try:
        cwd = os.path.dirname(fp) or '.'
        repo_root = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], text=True, cwd=cwd).strip()
        auth_path = os.path.join(repo_root, '.claude', '.edit-auth')
        if os.path.exists(auth_path):
            with open(auth_path) as f:
                if f.read().strip() == AUTHORIZED_EMAIL:
                    os.remove(auth_path)
                    sys.exit(0)
    except Exception:
        pass
    print(json.dumps({'decision': 'block', 'reason': bn + ' is write-protected. To authorize: echo \"suhaib.athar@gmail.com\" > .claude/.edit-auth'}))
    sys.exit(1)
"
